en.title: Best Hair, Skin and Nails Supplements 2026
en.description: The biotin, collagen and keratin beauty-from-within formulas I rank highest for hair, skin and nail support in 2026.

zh-tw.title: 2026 最佳髮膚甲保健排行榜

en.description: A clean 8,000 mcg single-ingredient biotin capsule with no fillers, made in an NSF-certified facility and the pick I trust when someone actually needs a therapeutic biotin dose.

zh-tw.description: 乾淨的 8,000 微克單方生物素膠囊，零填充劑，在 NSF 認證廠房生產，真的需要治療劑量生物素時我第一個推這款。

en.description: Capsules that combine 2.5 g of grass-fed bovine collagen peptides with 2x daily-value biotin and full daily-value vitamin C, the strongest choice when skin elasticity is the priority.

zh-tw.description: 膠囊把 2.5 克草飼牛膠原蛋白胜肽搭配兩倍每日建議量的生物素與滿額維他命 C，主打皮膚彈性時這款最有料。

en.description: USDA Organic vegan gummies with 2,500 mcg biotin plus vitamins C and E, the cleanest-label gummy I recommend for anyone who wants organic certification.

zh-tw.description: USDA 有機認證的純素軟糖，2,500 微克生物素加上維他命 C 與 E，想要有機認證的人我推這款成分最乾淨的軟糖。

en.description: Grapefruit gummies stacking 2,500 mcg biotin with keratin and vitamin C, the most palatable everyday beauty gummy on drugstore shelves.

zh-tw.description: 葡萄柚口味軟糖，2,500 微克生物素加上角蛋白與維他命 C，開架通路裡最好入口的日常美容軟糖。

en.description: Vegan 10,000 mcg biotin softgels suspended in organic coconut oil for absorption, non-GMO verified with a clean filler-free label at a low per-serving cost.

zh-tw.description: 純素 10,000 微克生物素軟膠囊，溶在有機椰子油裡幫助吸收，通過非基改認證，無填充劑，每份成本很低。

en.description: The strawberry gummy with 2,500 mcg biotin plus vitamins C and E that built the category, cheap, everywhere and backed by over 26,000 reviews.

zh-tw.description: 帶起整個品類的草莓軟糖，2,500 微克生物素加維他命 C 與 E，便宜又到處買得到，累積超過 2.6 萬則評論。

competitors.name: Nature Made Zero Sugar Hair Skin Nails

zh-tw.description: 無糖果膠軟糖，2,500 微克生物素加維他命 C 與 E，通過 USP 認證，怕糖的人我會直接推這款。

references.title: 8 Best Vitamins for Healthy Hair, Skin, and Nails
The 9 Best Vitamins for Hair, Skin, and Nails
The 5 best biotin supplements for 2026, tested and reviewed by registered dietitians

en.commentary: Here is my honest read after ranking this category: most of the beauty gummies on drugstore shelves are the same 2,500 mcg biotin base in different flavors, so I score them on what actually moves the needle. Nutrafol Core takes the top spot because it is the only pick here with a published clinical trial showing more hair growth and thickness at six months, and it works on the stress and DHT pathways that a basic biotin gummy cannot touch. That is why it earns the $79 price. If your problem is genuine thinning tied to hormones or stress, this is the one I recommend. HUM Hair Sweet Hair lands second on the strength of a real vegan formula, biotin plus fo-ti, zinc and B12, and third-party testing, which is rare in gummy land. Thorne Biotin 8000 is my pick for anyone who has an actual biotin need, because a clean single-ingredient dose in an NSF-certified capsule beats a diluted multi-nutrient blend when you want a therapeutic amount. Vital Proteins Beauty Edition is the smart buy for skin first, since collagen has the best evidence for elasticity and this stacks it with biotin and vitamin C. The gummies below, MaryRuth's, Olly, Sports Research, Nature's Bounty and Nature Made, are all fine, and I rank them on label cleanliness, certification and price. Nature's Bounty stays cheapest and most available, Nature Made wins on zero sugar and USP verification. One thing worth saying plainly: biotin can skew certain lab tests, including thyroid and troponin panels, so tell your doctor if you take a high dose. Beauty from within is real, but the dose and the ingredient matter more than the marketing.

highlights.title: Nutrafol is the only one here that earns its premium
highlights.body: At $79 a month Nutrafol Core is the expensive option, and it is worth it for the right person. It is the single pick in this ranking backed by its own published clinical trial showing more hair growth and thickness at six months, and it targets the stress and DHT drivers of thinning that a 2,500 mcg biotin gummy simply cannot reach. If your thinning is hormonal or stress-related, this is where I would put my money.

highlights.title: Most beauty gummies are the same base in different wrappers
highlights.body: Look past the flavors and Nature's Bounty, Olly, MaryRuth's and Nature Made are all built on roughly 2,500 mcg of biotin plus vitamins C and E. That is why I rank them on label cleanliness, certification and price rather than pretending one flavor works better. Nature's Bounty wins on price and availability, Nature Made on zero sugar and USP verification, MaryRuth's on organic certification.

highlights.title: If you actually need biotin, buy biotin, not a blend
highlights.body: Thorne Biotin 8000 is a clean single-ingredient capsule in an NSF-certified facility, and that is exactly what you want when you have a real biotin need such as brittle nails from a deficiency. A concentrated therapeutic dose with no fillers beats a multi-nutrient gummy that spreads a token amount of biotin across ten other ingredients.

highlights.title: For skin, collagen has the evidence, so lead with it
highlights.body: The research is strongest for collagen on skin elasticity and hydration, which is why Vital Proteins Beauty Edition ranks fourth despite not being a dedicated hair product. It pairs 2.5 g of grass-fed collagen peptides with biotin and vitamin C, so if your priority is skin rather than hair, this is the more honest buy than a biotin-only gummy.

highlights.title: High-dose biotin can distort your lab work
highlights.body: This matters and gets ignored. Biotin at the 8,000 to 25,000 mcg doses in Thorne, Sports Research and VITBOOST can interfere with certain blood tests, including thyroid hormone and troponin panels used to diagnose heart attacks. It is not dangerous to take, but tell your doctor before any lab draw so they can account for it. No beauty benefit is worth a misread test.

zh-tw.commentary: 把這個品類排完之後，我最誠實的心得是這樣：開架通路上大部分的美容軟糖，本質都是同一個 2,500 微克生物素配方換不同口味，所以我評分時只看真正有差別的東西。Nutrafol Core 拿第一，因為它是這份榜單裡唯一有發表臨床試驗的，數據顯示六個月後生髮量與髮量密度明顯提升，而且它作用在壓力荷爾蒙與 DHT 這兩條路徑上，這是普通生物素軟糖完全碰不到的。這也是它一個月要價這麼高卻值得的原因。如果你的問題是荷爾蒙或壓力造成的真掉髮，我就推這款。HUM Hair Sweet Hair 排第二，靠的是真材實料的純素配方，生物素加何首烏、鋅、B12，而且通過第三方檢驗，這在軟糖界很少見。Thorne Biotin 8000 是給真的有生物素需求的人用的，乾淨的單方劑量裝在 NSF 認證膠囊裡，想補到治療劑量時，這個就贏過那種把生物素稀釋掉的複方。Vital Proteins Beauty Edition 是主打皮膚的聰明選擇，膠原對皮膚彈性的證據最扎實，這款還疊了生物素跟維他命 C。下面的 MaryRuth's、Olly、Sports Research、Nature's Bounty、Nature Made 其實都不錯，我是用成分乾淨度、認證、價格來排。Nature's Bounty 最便宜也最好買，Nature Made 贏在無糖跟 USP 認證。有件事我得講清楚：高劑量生物素會干擾某些抽血檢測，包括甲狀腺跟心肌旋轉蛋白，吃高劑量前記得跟醫生說一聲。美容內服是真的有效，但劑量跟成分比行銷話術重要多了。

highlights.title: Nutrafol 是這裡唯一撐得起高價的一款
highlights.body: 一個月要價這麼高，Nutrafol Core 確實是貴的選項，但對的人用它就值得。它是這份榜單裡唯一有自家發表臨床試驗背書的，數據顯示六個月後生髮量與髮量密度提升，而且它鎖定的是壓力與 DHT 這兩條掉髮根源，這是 2,500 微克生物素軟糖根本搆不到的層次。掉髮如果是荷爾蒙或壓力來的，我的錢會投在這裡。

highlights.title: 大部分美容軟糖只是同一個底換包裝
highlights.body: 撇開口味不看，Nature's Bounty、Olly、MaryRuth's、Nature Made 全都建立在差不多 2,500 微克生物素加維他命 C 與 E 的底子上。所以我用成分乾淨度、認證、價格來排，而不是假裝哪個口味比較有效。Nature's Bounty 贏在便宜好買，Nature Made 贏在無糖跟 USP 認證，MaryRuth's 贏在有機認證。

highlights.title: 真的缺生物素就買生物素，別買複方
highlights.body: Thorne Biotin 8000 是乾淨的單方膠囊，在 NSF 認證廠房生產，這正是你真有生物素需求時要的東西，好比缺生物素導致的脆甲。一個無填充劑的濃縮治療劑量，就是比那種把一點點生物素分散到十種成分裡的複方軟糖來得實在。

highlights.title: 要顧皮膚，膠原證據最硬就從它下手
highlights.body: 研究裡證據最扎實的是膠原對皮膚彈性與保濕的效果，這也是 Vital Proteins Beauty Edition 能排到第四的原因，即使它不是專門的頭髮產品。它把 2.5 克草飼膠原胜肽搭配生物素跟維他命 C，所以你的重點如果是皮膚而非頭髮，這款比純生物素軟糖誠實多了。

highlights.title: 高劑量生物素會讓你的抽血數據失真
highlights.body: 這點很重要卻常被忽略。Thorne、Sports Research、VITBOOST 那種 8,000 到 25,000 微克的生物素劑量，會干擾某些血液檢測，包括甲狀腺荷爾蒙跟用來診斷心肌梗塞的旋轉蛋白。吃是不危險，但抽血前務必跟醫生說，讓他們把這因素算進去。沒有哪個美容效果值得換來一份誤判的檢測報告。
